# Planning Pages

Use these pages to shape the book into a family curriculum.

## Unit Planning Template

| Week | Reading | Spelling Focus | Writing Assignment | Project |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 |  |  |  |  |
| 2 |  |  |  |  |
| 3 |  |  |  |  |
| 4 |  |  |  |  |

## Student Writing Checklist

- I used complete sentences.
- I began sentences with capital letters.
- I ended sentences with correct punctuation.
- I checked the spelling words for this unit.
- I included a specific detail from the book.
- I read my work aloud and improved one sentence.

## Future Unit Ideas

- *Robinson Crusoe* by Daniel Defoe
- *Gulliver's Travels* by Jonathan Swift
- *The Pilgrim's Progress* by John Bunyan
- *Anne of Green Gables* by L. M. Montgomery
- *The Jungle Book* by Rudyard Kipling
- *Black Beauty* by Anna Sewell
